mnemonics: PENNY'S NASH: Players Equilibrate Nash's Notions, Yielding Stability (PENNY'S NASH) to remember the core concept of Nash Equilibrium in game theory.
keyPoints: Understand the concept of Nash Equilibrium and its existence proofs
Learn about mechanism design and incentive compatibility
Study the price of anarchy and stability in algorithmic systems
commonMistakes: Confusing Nash Equilibrium with other solution concepts like dominant strategy equilibrium
Assuming all games have pure strategy Nash equilibria (some require mixed strategies)
Forgetting that mechanism design must consider both incentive compatibility and efficiency simultaneously
